core_model.structure_summary: A system of coupled first-order ODEs for angular state variables, each driven by an intrinsic frequency and by a weighted (possibly asymmetric and signed) sum of sines of pairwise state differences over a graph.

variables.meaning: intrinsic frequencies and directed/signed/weighted coupling matrix entries

deterministic_skeleton.summary: First-order ODE system with additive constant drift and sinusoidal pairwise-difference coupling, whose synchronized/phase-locked solutions are fixed points of the difference dynamics.

notes: Clear generalized Kuramoto model with a weighted/signed/oriented adjacency matrix a_{ij}. Main results (synchronization existence/uniqueness, phase locking) concern fixed points of the phase-difference dynamics. Model is already deterministic, so the skeleton is the bare coupled-phase ODE with the graph weights left generic.
